Classes/SITBuilding.html#/c:objc(cs)SITB.name: -bounds
Classes/SITBuilding.html#/c:objc(cs)SITB.abstract: Compute corners of this building, without rotation, in earth coordinates.

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: -initWithBuildingId:
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: Constructor.

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: realtimeUpdateInterval
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: The time interval indicating how often the position should be uploaded to realtime.

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: useDeadReckoning
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: Set if you want to use dead reckoning to get fast position updates using only the inertial sensors,

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: useGps
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: Set if you want to use Gps for positioning indoor.

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: buildingID
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: Unique identifier of the building in which you want to locate a user. From SDK version 2.43.0, if this value is not set (it is nil or an empty string), the positioning will start in indoor-outdoor mode, regardless of the value of the deprecated property useGlobalLocation.

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: operationQueue
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: The thread where the location updates will be provided. If not provided, the main thread will be used.

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: options
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: Additional options to modify the internal operation of the Location provider (private usage only).

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: beaconFilters
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: Custom UUIDs. The system will also scan beacons with the specified UUIDs. Prior to SDK version 2.45.0 these scans were used only to position the user inside a building. From SDK version 2.45.0 on, if Global Location is active, these scans are also used to detect in which building the user is located.

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: interval
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: Set the desired interval for location updates, in milliseconds. This interval is inexact, the service will try to keep this rate in a “best effort” way.

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: smallestDisplacement
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: Minimum displacement between location updates

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: useBarometer
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: Set if you want to use barometer data for positioning.

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: outdoorLocationOptions
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: Object containing several options to configure the indoor/outdoor positioning.

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: preloadInfo
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: Boolean value indicating if the floorplan images and the POI categories images for the building should be download to cache while starting positioning.

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: useLocationsCache
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: Activate to use the location cache. It will smooth dispersion of initial positions on starts that occur shortly after stopping.

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: -isValid
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: Check if the request is valid.

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: -isUsingGlobalLocation
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: Check if indoor-outdoor mode is being used. From SDK version 2.43.0, indoor-outdoor mode is activated if location request, either the deprectated property useGlobalLocation is set to YES or buildingID is not set (it is nil or an empty string).

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: provider
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: One of SITLocationProvider.

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: updateInterval
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: The time interval indicating how often the position should be uploaded to realtime. Deprecated, use realtimeUpdateInterval instead.

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: useGlobalLocation
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: Set to true if you want to use indoor/outdoor positioning. Deprecated on SDK version 2.43.0. From that version on if buildingID is not set (it is nil or an empty string), indoor/outdoor positioning will be used, regardless of the value of this variable.

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.name: -initWithPriority:provider:updateInterval:buildingID:operationQueue:options:
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html#/c:objc(.abstract: Constructor.

Classes/SITEvent.html#/c:objc(cs)SITEven.name: updatedAt
Classes/SITEvent.html#/c:objc(cs)SITEven.abstract: Date containing the time when a resource was last updated.

Classes/SITEvent.html#/c:objc(cs)SITEven.name: url
Classes/SITEvent.html#/c:objc(cs)SITEven.abstract: Link to a website displaying relating info about the event

Classes/SITEvent.html#/c:objc(cs)SITEven.name: trigger
Classes/SITEvent.html#/c:objc(cs)SITEven.abstract: The area inside the SITIndoorBuilding where the event should be fired.

Classes/SITEvent.html#/c:objc(cs)SITEven.name: conversion
Classes/SITEvent.html#/c:objc(cs)SITEven.abstract: The area inside the SITIndoorBuilding where the event should be considered as converted

Classes/SITEvent.html#/c:objc(cs)SITEven.name: customFields
Classes/SITEvent.html#/c:objc(cs)SITEven.abstract: Custom fields that can be added from the Dashboard

Classes/SITEvent.html.name: SITEvent
Classes/SITEvent.html.abstract: An event: POI with radius, conversion area and asociated statistics. It is intended for usage in marketing apps

Classes/SITBeaconFilter.html.name: SITBeaconFilter
Classes/SITBeaconFilter.html.abstract: The purpose of this class is to hold information of custom uuids

Classes/SITFloorResource.html.name: SITFloorResource
Classes/SITFloorResource.html.abstract: A floor resource with building identifier and floor identifier

Classes/SITMultilanguageString.html.name: SITMultilanguageString
Classes/SITMultilanguageString.html.abstract: A string with a different value depending of the language.

Classes/SITURL.html.name: SITURL
Classes/SITURL.html.abstract: Abstraction of URL. Unifies management of both absolutes and relatives URLs.

Classes/SITCommunicationManager.html.name: SITCommunicationManager
Classes/SITCommunicationManager.html.abstract: The Communication manager allows you to make asynchronous requests to the server, mostly to fetch data.

Classes/SITDirectionsManager.html.name: SITDirectionsManager
Classes/SITDirectionsManager.html.abstract: Central component that provides guidances and routes to travel from a SITLocation or SITPoint to a destination place.

Classes/SITDirectionsRequest.html.name: SITDirectionsRequest
Classes/SITDirectionsRequest.html.abstract: Parameters to request a route with SITDirectionsManager.

Classes/SITCoordinateConverter.html.name: SITCoordinateConverter
Classes/SITCoordinateConverter.html.abstract: Utility class to convert between cartesian coordinates and geographical coordinates.

Classes/SITLocation.html.name: SITLocation
Classes/SITLocation.html.abstract: Describes a geographical position of the user, either indoor or outdoor.

Classes/SITLocationParametersUpdate.html.name: SITLocationParametersUpdate
Classes/SITLocationParametersUpdate.html.abstract: Data structure that stores information about changes in parameters of the location system that will be performed on the fly.

Classes/SITLocationRequest.html.name: SITLocationRequest
Classes/SITLocationRequest.html.abstract: A data object that contains parameters for the location service (SITLocationManager)

Classes/SITBuilding.html.name: SITBuilding
Classes/SITBuilding.html.abstract: Provides information about the places where indoor location is supported.

Classes/SITBuildingInfo.html.name: SITBuildingInfo
Classes/SITBuildingInfo.html.abstract: A building and its dependencies: floors, POIs and events

Classes/SITBuildingResource.html.name: SITBuildingResource
Classes/SITBuildingResource.html.abstract: Resource that has a one-to-one relationship with a SITBuilding.

Classes/SITPoint.html.name: SITPoint
Classes/SITPoint.html.abstract: Associate geographical coordinate (Location) with Building and Floor (Cartography) and cartesian coordinate relative to that building.

Classes/SITResource.html.name: SITResource
Classes/SITResource.html.abstract: Abstract base class with common properties across Resources

Classes/SITIndication.html.name: SITIndication
Classes/SITIndication.html.abstract: Represents the instruction that a user should follow when on a SITRouteStep to continue the route.

Classes/SITRoute.html.name: SITRoute
Classes/SITRoute.html.abstract: Route between two points. From and destination must be inside the same building.

Classes/SITRouteSegment.html.name: SITRouteSegment
Classes/SITRouteSegment.html.abstract: A continuous segment of a route that contains points of the same floor

Classes/SITRouteStep.html.name: SITRouteStep
Classes/SITRouteStep.html.abstract: A fragment of a route, described by an initial SITPoint (from) and a destination SITPoint (to). It also includes additional information about the fragment.

Classes/SITOrganizationTheme.html.name: SITOrganizationTheme
Classes/SITOrganizationTheme.html.abstract: Class to represents different parameters to adapt the look and feel of an organization.

Classes/SITThemeColors.html.name: SITThemeColors
Classes/SITThemeColors.html.abstract: Class the stores color definitions in hexadecimal to adapt the look and feel of your app.

Classes/SITRealTimeData.html.name: SITRealTimeData
Classes/SITRealTimeData.html.abstract: A data object that provides information about the location of users in real time

Classes/SITNavigationProgress.html.name: SITNavigationProgress
Classes/SITNavigationProgress.html.abstract: It provides information of the progress of a user while following a route.

Classes/SITNavigationRequest.html.name: SITNavigationRequest
Classes/SITNavigationRequest.html.abstract: Class that stores relevant information to request navigation updates.

Classes/SITRealTimeManager.html.name: SITRealTimeManager
Classes/SITRealTimeManager.html.abstract: Central point for accessing the location of the users in real time

Classes/SITRealTimeRequest.html.name: SITRealTimeRequest
Classes/SITRealTimeRequest.html.abstract: A data object that contains parameters for the real time service (SITRealTimeManager)

Classes/SITOutdoorLocationOptions.html.name: SITOutdoorLocationOptions
Classes/SITOutdoorLocationOptions.html.abstract: Outdoor location options used only in indoor-outdoor mode

Classes/SITPOI.html.name: SITPOI
Classes/SITPOI.html.abstract: This class represents a Point Of Interest inside a SITBuilding

Classes/SITServices.html.name: SITServices
Classes/SITServices.html.abstract: Service class for the Situm SDK for iOS

Type%20Definitions.html.abstract: The following type definitions are available globally.
